notes_for_consumers: Feeds environment prompts and footage queries. Pick season-correct content for the cell's retail-calendar moment; the Year-End demo pulls winter. The GL-vs-SW contrast on the Q4 winter cell is the demo's most legible customization moment. Low-confidence sensory mood (light/palette adjectives) is creative reference, not to be encoded verbatim; the high-confidence climate-and-landscape content is the operative layer.

winter.retail_moment: Big Finish (Dec), Black Friday (Nov), Start Something New (Jan)
winter.weather: sustained below freezing, lake-effect snow, snow on ground most of the season
winter.light: flat, low-angle, gray, short days, long blue hour
winter.landscape: bare deciduous, dark evergreens, salted roads, plowed snowbanks; ranch houses, pole barns
winter.activity_rhythm: garage time, indoor projects, snowmobile season; trucks plow, haul firewood, carry salt
winter.cgi_footage_implication: The winter cell with the strongest seasonal visual; the snow-and-gray palette is the GL signature.

spring.retail_moment: Declaration of Deals (Mar–Apr), 4x4 Day, Truck Month
spring.weather: thaw, mud season, late-snow events possible, daytime 40s–60s
spring.light: lengthening days, harsh midday, golden return
spring.landscape: bare branch leafing, mud, last snow patches, lakes opening
spring.activity_rhythm: boats out of storage, mud season for off-road, garages reopen to outdoor work

summer.retail_moment: Make This The Summer Event, Summer of Jeep
summer.weather: warm, humid in lower-elevation areas, thunderstorm afternoons
summer.light: long days, golden evening, blue hour stretches late
summer.landscape: full deciduous canopy, lake activity, cottage culture, county fairs
summer.activity_rhythm: boat-launch concentration weekends, fishing and hunting prep, construction season peak

fall.weather: cooling fast, leaf turn Sept–Oct, first frost by mid-October, first snow late Oct in north
fall.light: shorter days, warmer color palette, late golden hour
fall.landscape: leaf color (red, orange, yellow, brown), bare branches in late fall, harvest signage
fall.activity_rhythm: deer opener, harvest, football culture, winter prep (firewood, plows mounted, boat into storage)
